evals.name: emergency-plumbing-austin
evals.prompt: I need a service page for my plumbing company, Lone Star Plumbing in Austin TX. We do emergency burst pipe repair, 24/7 service, licensed and insured since 2008. Texas Master Plumber License #M-42198. Average response time 45 minutes. We have 4.8 stars from 312 Google reviews. Phone is (512) 555-0147.
evals.expected_output: Bootstrap 5 HTML emergency service page with safety notice in rows 2-3, reviews carousel, symptom matrix, pricing table, progressive CTAs, local Austin references, FAQ with JSON-LD schema

assertions.name: has_safety_notice_early
assertions.description: SAFETY_NOTICE appears before any educational content (within first 3 sections)

assertions.name: has_reviews_carousel
assertions.description: Page includes a reviews carousel with 4+ testimonials, not just a single quote

assertions.name: progressive_ctas
assertions.description: No two CTAs on the page use identical text

assertions.name: no_em_dashes
assertions.description: Zero em-dash characters in the output

assertions.name: local_references
assertions.description: At least 2 specific Austin local references (neighborhoods, landmarks, climate factors)

assertions.name: bootstrap5_grid
assertions.description: Uses Bootstrap 5 grid classes (col-*, row, container)

assertions.name: faq_schema
assertions.description: FAQPage JSON-LD structured data present

assertions.name: anti_slop_clean
assertions.description: No banned vague adjectives without evidence (best, quality, professional, experienced, trusted, expert, state-of-the-art, premier, comprehensive)

assertions.name: sticky_mobile_cta
assertions.description: Sticky mobile CTA with call/text buttons for emergency page

assertions.name: pricing_transparency
assertions.description: Pricing table with specific dollar ranges, not just 'competitive pricing'

evals.name: cosmetic-veneers-sydney-ahpra
evals.prompt: Build a service page for cosmetic veneers at a dental practice called Harbour Dental in Sydney, Australia. Dr. Lisa Nguyen is a general dentist with a focus on cosmetic procedures, 15 years experience, AHPRA registration DEN0001847293. This is AHPRA-regulated. Phone (02) 9555 1234. Located at 42 Harbour St, Sydney NSW 2000. They have 4.9 stars from 156 Google reviews.
evals.expected_output: Bootstrap 5 HTML service page for cosmetic veneers, AHPRA-compliant (no forbidden words), research/planning intent, detailed process timeline, pricing with ranges, FAQ, proper practitioner title (General Dentist not Cosmetic Dentist)

assertions.name: ahpra_no_forbidden_titles
assertions.description: Does NOT use 'Cosmetic Dentist' as a title (AHPRA restricted). Uses 'General Dentist with a focus on cosmetic procedures' or similar

assertions.name: ahpra_no_forbidden_words
assertions.description: Does NOT contain words: specialist, expert, expertise, perfect, guarantee, painless, pain-free

assertions.name: ahpra_registration_visible
assertions.description: AHPRA registration number DEN0001847293 is displayed on the page

assertions.name: veneer_irreversibility_warning
assertions.description: Includes a warning that veneers are irreversible (tooth preparation cannot be undone)

assertions.name: no_em_dashes
assertions.description: Zero em-dash characters in the output

assertions.name: progressive_ctas
assertions.description: No two CTAs on the page use identical text

assertions.name: bootstrap5_grid
assertions.description: Uses Bootstrap 5 grid classes

assertions.name: process_timeline
assertions.description: Detailed step-by-step process timeline for veneer procedure

assertions.name: planning_intent_tone
assertions.description: Educational, no-pressure tone appropriate for research/planning intent (no aggressive urgency)

assertions.name: no_warranty_guarantee
assertions.description: Does NOT guarantee clinical outcomes or offer warranties on veneers (AHPRA prohibited)

evals.name: recurring-lawn-care-charlotte
evals.prompt: Create a service page for GreenEdge Lawn Care in Charlotte, NC. Weekly lawn mowing and seasonal treatments. Family-owned since 2015, 4.7 stars from 85 Google reviews. Phone (704) 555-0823. They serve South Charlotte, Ballantyne, Myers Park, and Dilworth neighborhoods. Plans start at $35/week for standard mowing.
evals.expected_output: Bootstrap 5 HTML service page for recurring lawn care, planning intent, subscription/plan pricing emphasis, local Charlotte references, warm family-business tone, no emergency urgency

assertions.name: recurring_pricing
assertions.description: Pricing emphasizes recurring plans/subscriptions (weekly, monthly) rather than one-time service

assertions.name: no_emergency_urgency
assertions.description: No emergency language, safety notices, or aggressive urgency CTAs

assertions.name: local_references
assertions.description: At least 2 specific Charlotte references (neighborhoods like Ballantyne, Myers Park provided in prompt)

assertions.name: no_em_dashes
assertions.description: Zero em-dash characters in the output

assertions.name: progressive_ctas
assertions.description: No two CTAs on the page use identical text

assertions.name: bootstrap5_grid
assertions.description: Uses Bootstrap 5 grid classes

assertions.name: planning_tone
assertions.description: Warm, no-pressure tone appropriate for planning/research intent

assertions.name: anti_slop_clean
assertions.description: No banned vague adjectives without evidence

assertions.name: consistency_messaging
assertions.description: Messaging about consistency, reliability, ongoing service (recurring service pattern)

assertions.name: faq_present
assertions.description: FAQ section addressing common lawn care questions
